title: 12pcs Colorful Christmas Baubles Set，Xmas Baubles 6cm/2.4 in Shiny Disco Ball Set for Christmas Tree，Holiday Party Home Store Decorations（Silvery,Red,Pink,Green,Golden）
features: 【Package contents】You will receive 12 pieces of 6cm/2.4 inch Xmas Baubles in the package, contain 5 clors mirror Christmas Baubles Set ：Silvery*4，Red*2，Pink*2,Green*2,Golden*2.

【Chic Design】The surface of the hanging Christmas Baubles Set is covered with tiny mirror squares, when the ball rotates, it can reflect light beautifully to the entire room; The Xmas Baubles will produce amazing effects when it is illuminated by different lights.

【Easy to Hang 】Each bauble comes pre-tied with a cap and string, makes decorating effortless. These lightweight Christmas baubles gives a balanced festive look, for your xmas tree topper, garlands, or wreaths.
【High-Quality Material】Made with high-quality foam and glass materials, these lightweight mirror balls are reflective and durable, providing long-lasting use for all your decorating needs.

【Application】Used for Christmas, weddings, anniversaries, party variegated displays, such as hanging ornaments on branches, table decorations, around banister, above reception at different lengths, etc.
description: Product Description Why choice our Disco Balls? Colorful combinations This set of 12 disco balls comes in 5 eye-catching colors, each 2.4 inches in the moderate size. Designed specifically for festivals, parties and other occasions, they add a joyful vibe to the events. Shining mirrors These disco balls are covered with evenly - cut tiny mirrors. When light shines on these mirrors, it reflects light at different angles to the surroundings, forming bright spots like twinkling stars. When the light & color change, they will present a more gorgeous visual effect. Well-crafted These gleaming disco balls are handcrafted by skilled workers: small glass mirrors are bonded to foam balls with glue, creating a sturdy finish that prevents the mirrors from falling off easily. This Christmas disco ball set, on Xmas trees, railings, wreaths, or otherwise, adds festive joy & warmth to your holiday.
